reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención a pesar del gran movimiento que hubo en Carnaval.
Como sugerencia, una fila para Socios ACA, y otra para los que no lo son. Empleados muy amables. Instalaciones muy limpias.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service despite the high volume during Carnival.
As a suggestion, separate lines would be needed for ACA members and non-members. Very friendly staff. Very clean facilities.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Patricia por su puntuación y comentario, tratemos mantener la limpieza

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkZ3NiTFZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
En días turísticos y de escases la cola es demasiado lenta, el día que cargué solo funcionaba un dispensador y solo cargaba infinia. Los otros 3 dispensadores estaban fuera de servicio. Lo bueno que se paga con aplicación. Lo malo es que no pude calibrar mis cubiertas, porque no tienen aire comprimido

(Translated by Google)
On busy days and during periods of low demand, the line is incredibly slow. The day I filled up, only one pump was working, and it only dispensed Infinia brand fuel. The other three pumps were out of service. The good thing is that you pay with an app. The bad thing is that I couldn't inflate my tires because they don't have compressed air.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Natal le comento que en este momento es temporada alta por lo que las filas soninterminable, los picos que vio sin funcionar son de infinia diesel y NAFTA súper diferentes productos  no se encuentran fuera de servicio y lo del aire lamentablemente se nos rompió el compresor.
Nos disculpamos por su experiencia

reviews.comment:
Soy socia del ACA (I'm an ACA member). En esta estación, nos permitieron dejar nuestro vehículo a resguardo mientras viajábamos a Iruya. Destaco  la amabilidad y la predisposición para atender a dos viajeros cansados a las 10 de la noche y resolver nuestro problema. Siempre estaremos agradecidos por su accionar. ( In this gas station, we were allowed to leave our car while travelling to Iruya. I would like to highlight the kindness and good disposition  to help two of us,tired travellers, at 10 pm and offer a solution to our problem. We will always be thankful!
Recomendamos esta estación! (I highly recommend this station.)

iajar a  when we needed to leave our park in Humahuaca to travel to Iruya by bus.

(Translated by Google)
I'm an ACA member. At this gas station, they allowed us to leave our vehicle safely while we traveled to Iruya. I want to highlight their kindness and willingness to help two tired travelers at 10 pm and resolve our problem. We will always be grateful for their actions. (At this gas station, we were allowed to leave our car while traveling to Iruya. I would like to highlight the kindness and willingness to help two of us, tired travelers, at 10 pm and offer a solution to our problem. We will always be thankful!)

We highly recommend this station!

We used it when we needed to leave our park in Humahuaca to travel to Iruya by bus.

reviewReply.comment: Gabriela muy agradecido por su puntuación y comentario. También agradecemos su exelente trato y unidad para con el personal

reviews.comment:
Llegamos ayer a la tarde en moto a humaguaca y nos encontramos que no había combustible !! 24 horas después seguimos barados en la estación!!!

We arrived in Humaguaca yesterday afternoon by motorcycle and found there was no fuel!! 24 ​​hours later we're still stranded at the station!!!
